objective: Prove that pre-baseline exemptions only apply when run artifact files still match their create-run template hashes.
blocking_rule: If any run artifact file differs from its create-run template hash before gate-generator, fail instead of treating it as baseline state.
in_scope: Use only the sprint-006 run directory as the touched path.
Keep all pre-baseline artifact files identical to their create-run template hashes.
Pass gate-close under the stricter template-hash exemption rule.
out_of_scope: Harness changes outside the sprint-006 run directory.

acceptance_criteria.statement: gate-generator captures the baseline automatically for sprint-006.
Pre-baseline run artifact files are only exempt when they still match the create-run template hashes.
sprint-006 passes gate-close without manual baseline seeding.

evaluator_checks: The run uses only its own artifact directory as touched scope.
Template-hash exemption is enforced for pre-baseline artifact files.
